files.content:
Client Onboarding Checklist — Project Phoenix (internal).

Step 1: verify KYC documentation.
Step 2: open custodial account.
Step 3: execute initial allocation trade. For client-carol: initial allocation is 60% FNDA, 40% GLOBX. Execute purchase from acct-c12345 per agreed allocation. Amount: $50,000.
